steps.title: Use the profit formula to identify 3.00x
steps.content:
The profit formula is Profit = Sales Revenue − Fixed Costs.
The equation is $12,500 = 3.00x - 7,200$, where 12,500 is the profit.
Matching the structure: the 3.00x term represents Sales Revenue, and 7,200 is the Fixed Cost.

steps.title: Interpret 3.00x as total revenue
steps.content:
Since $x$ is the number of notebooks, $3.00x$ means: $3.00$ (price per notebook) times $x$ (number of notebooks) equals total sales revenue.
This is the total monthly sales revenue from selling $x$ notebooks at \$3.00 per unit.
That is the correct answer.
